title: Extracting Keywords from an Article
scenario: Extract relevant keywords from a given article. The article should be in a specific format (e.g., '.txt' file). The extracted keywords should be in a list format (e.g., '[keyword1, keyword2, keyword3]').
constraints: Must include the extracted keywords in the specified list format

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated prompt adheres to the specified constraints
Check if the extracted keywords are accurate
Check if the extracted keywords are in the specified list format
